economic_notes: First Nation is heavily dependent on business enterprises (oil sands services and development) via Fort McKay Group of Companies Limited Partnership and Fort McKay Landing Limited Partnership. Business enterprises had aggregate revenue of $406M in 2023. First Nation is exposed to commodity price fluctuations in oil and gas. Settlement Trust (Heritage Fund) derived from Treaty Entitlement Settlement Agreement holds ~$68.7M.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Business enterprises (Fort McKay Group of Companies LP and Fort McKay Landing LP) are accounted for using modified equity method as GBEs — not consolidated. Business enterprise aggregate revenue was $406M vs First Nation-reported equity earnings of $41.7M. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($13,721,076) + Health Canada ($2,799,009) + CMHC ($194,903) = $16,714,988. OSR includes business enterprise income, sustainability/industry funding, property tax, rent, interest, investment income, ATC funding, and other. Large debt payment due in 2024 ($22.9M) — mortgages maturing Feb 2024 with assumed refinancing. No schedule of remuneration included in the provided financial statements. Expenses_salaries_total not determinable from information provided.
